---
title: "Nostradamus datacube"
---

A dedicated cube in a box has been deployed for the Nostradamus project:

![](images/clipboard-3781916670.png)

It is a modifed clone from the original cube in a box available here: ![](images/clipboard-448434912.png)

The following modifications have been done on the original cube in a box to become the Nostradamus data cube:

-   Default Jupyter notebook replaced by Jupyterlab

-   "sign_url" function added to access data in «Planetary Computer»

-   Default source for Sentinel-2 has been replaced by Planetary Computer as it was slow and unstable

-   The default ESRI Land Cover source in Planetary Computer (<https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/dataset/io-lulc)> that is deprecated has been replaced by <https://planetarycomputer.microsoft.com/dataset/io-lulc-annual-v02>

-   Landsat Collection 2 Level 2 Science Products added (see slide 5) Jupyter notebook modified or created for each available Level2 science product (see slides 6 to 8)

-   Datacube-explorer added and modified to access Planetary Computer data

-   DATETIME added as make argument (allows to filter the time range of interest)

![](images/NOSTRADAMUS_logo.png)
